description: Fully-integrated IEEE 802.3-compliant PoE PD interface and low-EMI switching regulator

1.name: EROUT
1.description: Error-amplifier output and PWM input; directly connected to opto-coupler in isolated application.

2.name: SSFT*
2.description: Not internally connected; legacy pin for compatibility.

3.name: VDD
3.description: 5 V supply rail for switcher; provides drive for opto-coupler.

4.name: ISOSSFT*
4.description: Not internally connected; legacy pin for compatibility.

5.name: PLOSS
5.description: Early power loss indicator; open drain output is pulled to VPOS when VPORT is applied.

6.name: RDET
6.description: Input pin for external precision detection resistor; also used for establishing absolute current reference.

7.name: HSO
7.description: Hotswap switch output; connects to VNEG through hotswap switch.

8.name: RCL
8.description: Input pin for external precision classification resistor.

9.name: VNEG
9.description: Rectified high-voltage supply, negative rail. Must be connected to thermal PAD node.

EP.name: VNEG
EP.description: Rectified high-voltage supply, negative rail. Must be connected to thermal PAD node.

10.name: SP2
10.description: High-voltage supply input from spare pair; polarity-insensitive.

11.name: SP1
11.description: High-voltage supply input from spare pair; polarity-insensitive.

12.name: VPOSF
12.description: Rectified high-voltage supply, positive rail (force node).

13.name: CT2
13.description: High-voltage supply input from center tap of Ethernet transformer; polarity-insensitive.

14.name: CT1
14.description: High-voltage supply input from center tap of Ethernet transformer; polarity-insensitive.

15.name: VSSA
15.description: Analog ground. Internally connected to VSS2.

16.name: VPOSS*
16.description: Not internally connected; legacy pin for compatibility.

17.name: VSS1*
17.description: Not internally connected; legacy pin for compatibility.

18.name: SWO
18.description: Switching transistor output; drain of switching N-FET.

19.name: VSS2
19.description: Negative supply rail for switcher; externally tied to HSO.

20.name: FB
20.description: Regulated feedback input in non-isolated application.

θJA.conditions: Still air; assumes a minimum of nine thermal vias are connected to a 2 in² heat spreader plane for the package "pad" node (VNEG).
